overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a blue-skinned Na'vi character walking through a bioluminescent cave system that transitions to a bright outdoor jungle with floating mountains. The environment features organic structures, glowing flora, tribal decorations, and massive tree formations.

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a woven wooden pathway through a winding tunnel. Purple fabric banners hang on the left as natural daylight becomes increasingly visible at the tunnel exit ahead.

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the cave into a bright, sunlit jungle settlement. Massive floating mountains hover in the sky above, while colorful fabric tents and giant tree roots dominate the landscape. Other Na'vi figures can be seen walking in the distance as flying creatures soar overhead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the depths of a bioluminescent cavern into a sprawling, sunlit jungle settlement. It begins in a narrow, dark tunnel where the walls glow with blue and purple hues, moving steadily toward a distant lit archway. As the character enters a larger chamber, the environment shifts to a tribal hub decorated with hanging fabrics and lanterns, passing other Na'vi figures resting on wooden platforms. The scene then transitions onto a woven wooden pathway through a winding tunnel, where purple banners line the walls as natural daylight begins to bleed through the exit. Finally, the camera emerges from the cave into a bright outdoor landscape dominated by giant tree roots and colorful tents, with massive floating mountains hovering in the sky above as flying creatures soar overhead.
